dataset: 2584 shots, 291 disrupted (209 with parsed time + 82 expert)
analysis: Detection still low (18%) even with proper disruption times. 32 features (raw+rates) cannot distinguish diverse disruption types: VDE from FA cutout, locked modes, density limits, early termination all have different precursor signatures. Need multi-scale features (78f) or type-specific models.
key_finding: 714 shots with PARSED DISRUPTION TIME from operator comments. This is the first time we have millisecond-precision disruption onset labels for MAST. Previously only had binary disrupted/clean labels from disruption-py.
